summary: Today's sweep leans toward Democracy / press freedom, Games / criticism, AI / privacy. The strongest items in this run are Trump says he would be ‘disappointed’ if Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh did not cut interest rates – US politics live, Purdue Pharma expected to forfeit $225m as sentence in criminal opioids case, and Off the Grid studio Gunzilla faced a forced shutdown petition over alleged unpaid bills, and are accused of owing one company over $100,000.

mainItems.title: Trump says he would be ‘disappointed’ if Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh did not cut interest rates – US politics live
mainItems.summary: Warsh faces Congress confirmation hearing to succeed Jerome Powell when his term ends on 15 May Kevin Warsh: Trump’s ideal choice to push Fed to cut interest rates Sign up for the Breaking News US email Donald Trump said that he does not…
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to state power, civil liberties, and anti-authoritarian concerns.

mainItems.title: Purdue Pharma expected to forfeit $225m as sentence in criminal opioids case
mainItems.summary: Under settlement, Sackler family will pay state, local and Native American tribal governments, individual victims and others Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox A judge is expected to sentence…
mainItems.whyItMatters: Touches trust, surveillance, and the private use of AI systems.

mainItems.title: Off the Grid studio Gunzilla faced a forced shutdown petition over alleged unpaid bills, and are accused of owing one company over $100,000
mainItems.summary: Gunzilla Games, the studio behind NFT-infected battle royale game Off The Grid , have been accused of owing a marketing company over $100,000 and is facing more allegations from workers that their pay has been delayed.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth your time if you care about design, criticism, and not just hype.

mainItems.title: California Schools Face Budget Cuts as Enrollment Drops by 74,961 Students
mainItems.summary: Enrollment in California K-12 schools, and in schools across the country, is declining rapidly as birth rates drop and immigration rates fall.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Directly relevant to teaching, classroom practice, and educational judgment.

mainItems.title: Trump’s latest border wall plans to slice through Big Bend national park: ‘Our lives are being upended’
mainItems.summary: The rural Texas region, long spared, is being fast-tracked for the border wall amid bipartisan opposition Tractors suddenly appeared at the entrance to Chispa Road near the US-Mexico border in rural Big Bend, Texas, in late March.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to state power, civil liberties, and anti-authoritarian concerns.

mainItems.title: Dragon Ball and Digimon producer Toei announces Toei Games, focusing on new IPs first
mainItems.summary: Anyone who even half-cares about anime knows about Toei Animation, but that's just one of the arms of Toei Company, a broader entertainment giant.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth your time if you care about design, criticism, and not just hype.

mainItems.title: Yelp is making its AI chatbot way more useful
mainItems.summary: Yelp is giving its chatbot assistant a major upgrade, turning the platform into something closer to a digital concierge with a suite of new features designed for "getting things done.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to the shape of current AI systems and where the tooling is moving.

mainItems.title: Creating Communicators and Critical Thinkers: Soon There Will Be A Test For That
mainItems.summary: Educators at the Making Waves Academy knew they wanted to teach high school students to be good communicators, problem solvers and critical thinkers to succeed in a rapidly changing world.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Directly relevant to teaching, student agency, and school policy.

mainItems.title: Tucker Carlson says he regrets backing Donald Trump and is ‘tormented’
mainItems.summary: The podcaster admits he ‘misled’ supporters as his rift with the US president deepens over the Iran war US politics live – latest updates Tucker Carlson , a conservative podcaster, has said he is “tormented” by his support of Donald Trump…
mainItems.whyItMatters: Worth watching for authoritarian drift, selective enforcement, and democratic norms.

mainItems.title: The surprising origin of 4 features that superglue kids — and adults — to screens
mainItems.summary: Taken together, these four features can create a trancelike state that can keep us stuck on social media apps or video games for hours. Children are particularly vulnerable.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to your current interest graph.

mainItems.title: This AI Tool Rips Off Open Source Software Without Violating Copyright
mainItems.summary: Malus, which is a piece of satire but also fully functional, performs a "clean room" clone of open source software, meaning users could then sell software without crediting the original developers.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Relevant to your current interest graph.

mainItems.title: Tim Cook to step down as Apple CEO. In letter, describes 15 years of emails
mainItems.summary: The 65-year-old Cook will turn over CEO duties to Apple's head of hardware products, John Ternus, in September. Cook will remain with the company as executive chairman.
mainItems.whyItMatters: Interesting where engineering, science, and tech infrastructure collide.

mainItems.title: Hokum Trailer Sees Adam Scott Surrounded By Dead Goats and an Evil Witch
mainItems.summary: A long time ago, there was a witch who scared the crap out of me in this trailer The post Hokum Trailer Sees Adam Scott Surrounded By Dead Goats and an Evil Witch appeared first on Reactor .
mainItems.whyItMatters: On-theme for your cultural interests, especially when the concept is strong.

highlights.title: A.I. Is Prompting an Evolution, Not Extinction, for Coders
highlights.notes: Interesting piece on the current state of AI in software work.

highlights.title: The Workers Letting A.I. Do Their Jobs
highlights.notes: In an era of agents powered by artificial intelligence, many programmers are barely programming.

highlights.title: Trump’s presidency is what evil looks like: absurd, frightening, cruel
highlights.notes: Particularly strong Guardian opinion piece, noted for future briefing highlights.
